case_title: ANDREWS, STEPHEN P. JR. VS GUMMER, ERIN A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ANDREWS, STEPHEN P. JR. AS TO DEFENDANT GUMMER, ERIN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDREWS, STEPHEN P. JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUMMER, ERIN A. $3,245.12 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,281.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GUMMER, ERIN A. HEARING SET FOR JUN-21-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GUMMER, ERIN A.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-21-1993, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT GUMMER, ERIN A.
